title: dactylis glomerata var. ebusitana
intro: Dactylis glomerata var. ebusitana, also known as Ebusitana orchard grass, is a variant of the common grass species Dactylis glomerata. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dactylis glomerata var. ebusitana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant have been used as a tea or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
